Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendant, And Request For Sanctions - First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Zachary Powell, Esq., of KNIGHT LAW GROUP, LLP. Tel: (310) 552-2250. for plaintiffs MIGUEL NIC VILLANUEVA & INGRID XIU MUKUL.
MICHAEL Foley, Esq., of BOWMAN AND BROOKE LLP. Tel: (408) 279-5393 for defendant AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC.

Hearing held. Plaintiff's counsel contests the tentative ruling but has not provided any specific reasons. Defendant counsel contests the tentative ruling regarding the sanctions awarded in all three motions. The matter argued/discussed. Defendant's counsel requests that the Court either reduce or vacate the sanctions imposed in connection with the three motions at issue. Counsel acknowledges the deficiencies in the meet and confer process and submits that the failure to adequately confer was due to a lack of available personnel. The Court having heard oral argument simultaneously the 3 motions rules as follows:

3 - PLAINTIFFs MIGUEL VILLANUEVA,and INGRID MUKUL's Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendant, And Request For Sanctions - First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents.The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Hearing held. Plaintiff's counsel contests the tentative ruling but has not provided any specific reasons. Defendant counsel contests the tentative ruling regarding the sanctions awarded in all three motions. The matter argued/discussed. Defendant's counsel requests that the Court either reduce or vacate the sanctions imposed in connection with the three motions at issue. Counsel acknowledges the deficiencies in the meet and confer process and submits that the failure to adequately confer was due to a lack of available personnel. The Court having heard oral argument simultaneously the 3 motions rules as follows:
